description: Start streaming QTDATA (quaternion tracking data) messages at a specified update interval, in a named coordinate system. Identical body layout to STT_TDATA.

fields.name: resolution
fields.description: Minimum time between consecutive QTDATA messages, in milliseconds. 0 means 'as fast as possible'.

fields.name: coord_name
fields.description: Name of the coordinate system for reported tracking data. Null-padded to 32 bytes. Empty string means 'server default'.
